terracotta-client.permissions.newAppConn: %1$s would like permission to use the above abilities
terracotta-client.permissions.knownAppCo: %1$s has connected to Minecraft with the above abilities
terracotta-client.permissions.indefinite: It will retain access to these abilities §eindefinitely§r unless you revoke them.
terracotta-client.permissions.appRemoved: Removed all permissions from %1$s. It may re-request these permissions.
terracotta-client.permissions.removeConf:
Clicking 'Remove App' will permanently revoke all permissions previously granted to %1$s and disconnect it.

It will be able to re-request these permissions, but you will have to manually authorize it again before it can connect.
[ Click here to manage app permissions ]
